## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, technical SEO, and podcast plans.](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New team member Nika introduced; will support technical SEO and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Indexing issues largely resolved; technical audit shared for further website health improvements](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Podcast strategy evolving; exploring new formats and content spin-offs](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Spam trap issue affecting email deliverability and LinkedIn sharing; seeking resolution](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation and Review

  - [10 articles scheduled for delivery on Friday; 12 more in the pipeline for next week](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Conor to review upcoming topics today](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Enhanced quality control process in place, including Nika's technical review](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Indexing problem largely resolved; remaining URLs being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Nika shared detailed technical audit document with prioritized fixes](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)
  - [Meta titles/descriptions to be auto-generated and manually reviewed by next week](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Potential organic search drop (\~13%) noticed; investigating possible causes](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### Email Deliverability Issues

  - [Galileo domain flagged by Spamhouse, affecting email deliverability and LinkedIn sharing](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Shohil working on resolving the issue; database cleanup undertaken](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Team discussing strategies to identify and avoid spam trap emails](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### Podcast Strategy and Content Spin-offs

  - [Current format: panel discussions + interviews from Productionize event](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Future plans (Jan 2024): news segments, opinionated discussions, full-length interviews](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Exploring content spin-offs: chain-of-thought posts, frameworks extraction, short-form video](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Team to provide Conor with list of required files for weekly content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

### Brand Rankings Improvement

  - [Kyle suggested focusing on building topical authority around target phrases](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Recommended incorporating "People Also Ask" questions into content](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Team to start Slack thread for further discussion and strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Conor to review upcoming article topics today](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)

  - [Vianca to provide list of required podcast files for weekly content creation](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Kyle to start Slack thread for brand rankings improvement strategies](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Nika to investigate potential issues with "Ron Galileo" references](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Team to continue addressing spam trap and email deliverability issues](https://fathom.video/share/4VCdqoxx74sFjWr7zWJdsixB8aCxazC6?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
